summary: E2E Bet Placement Flow testing completed successfully. Backend POST /api/bets endpoint and frontend integration both working correctly. Wallet balance deduction, bet history persistence, and insufficient balance handling all verified.
seed_data_creation: Test bets created with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bet placement E2E flow fully tested. Backend POST /api/bets deducts wallet balance, creates transaction record, and saves bet to history. Frontend correctly calls api.post('/bets') and refreshes wallet after successful bet. Login uses OAuth2PasswordRequestForm (form data, not JSON).

backend_api.POST /api/bets: PASS - Places bet, deducts wallet, creates transaction
backend_api.GET /api/wallet: PASS - Returns updated balance after bet
